sevenDay.synopsis: Things are looking good today thru mid-week with VFR and NEG hazards expected. Thursday AM, a frontal boundary will approach the area. We could see a couple of showers late-AM with increasing chances for showers/ISOLD TS for the PM. Winds will gust up to 20-22kts. We clear out for Friday, but rain returns for Saturday and Sunday.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 04 MAY - 10 MAY
